div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Japan (Forbes)
div.p: 278. Your 280, December 26, 4 p.m., last paragraph. On December 23 the Department telegraphed to the American Consul at GenevaTelegram not printed. the text of the opening and the concluding paragraphs of the statement telegraphed to you in Department’s 273, December 22, 9 p.m.Foreign Relations, Japan, 1931–1941, vol. i, p. 65. and requested that the Consul inform the Secretary General of the League thereof in confidence.
If you deem it advisable, you may give French Ambassador in strict confidence a copy of whole statement.
